resolution: Architect blocker addressed in commit 39e5209: VersionToken.Token now derives from SHA-256(sorted key + big-endian value length) per key — plaintext never touched. v1.1 TODO to switch to per-key `infisical secrets get --format json`. Also tightened looksLikeAuthFailure (A1) and cosmetic A3 ('<anonymous>' for empty provider name).
advisory_deferred: pragmatic: NewFactory no production callers yet; subprocess nil-guard unreachable
architect A2 (ensureLoaded not single-flight — documented rough edge, sync.Once refactor deferred)
maintainer M1 (subprocess errors lack project/env/path context)
